# Content CMS Module

Module ID: content-cms
Status: draft
Purpose: Headless CMS content models, fields, versioned entries, localizations, locales, and media metadata.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Primary service: createContentCmsService
Stores: createContentCmsMemoryStore, createD1ContentCmsStore
Check: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/content-cms check:spec
Build: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/content-cms build
Test: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/content-cms test

Boundaries:
- Owns D1 metadata and domain behavior for content publishing.
- Does not own auth, billing, R2 uploads, CDN policy, AI page design, or public renderer templates.
- Use getEntrySnapshot for route/API read models instead of reaching into version tables.
